items.definition_en: A teacher is a person who helps people learn.
items.example_en: The teacher explains the lesson to the class.

items.definition_en: A doctor is someone who helps sick people feel better.
items.example_en: The doctor checks the small child.

items.definition_en: A nurse is a person who helps doctors and cares for patients.
items.example_en: The nurse brings water to the patient.

items.definition_en: A police officer is a person who keeps people safe and stops crime.
items.example_en: A police officer helps the lost child.

items.definition_en: A firefighter puts out fires and helps in emergencies.
items.example_en: The firefighter quickly entered the burning house.

items.definition_en: A driver is someone who drives a car, bus, or truck.
items.example_en: The driver stops at the red light.

items.definition_en: A cook is a person who makes food in a kitchen.
items.example_en: The cook prepares a big meal.

items.definition_en: A waiter takes orders and serves food in a restaurant.
items.example_en: The waiter brings our food to the table.

items.definition_en: A farmer grows food and looks after animals.
items.example_en: The farmer works in the fields every day.

items.definition_en: A shop assistant helps customers in a shop.
items.example_en: The shop assistant helps me choose shoes.

items.definition_en: A worker is someone who does a job.
items.example_en: The worker starts his shift at the factory.

items.definition_en: A manager is a person who leads people in their work.
items.example_en: The manager talks to the team every morning.

items.definition_en: An actor is a person who plays roles in films or plays.
items.example_en: The actor is on the stage at the theater.

items.definition_en: A cleaner is someone who cleans places like offices or homes.
items.example_en: The cleaner sweeps the floor every day.

items.definition_en: An engineer plans and builds things like machines or roads.
items.example_en: The engineer checks the bridge carefully.

items.definition_en: A builder is a person who makes houses and buildings.
items.example_en: The builder works on the new house.

items.definition_en: A dentist is a person who takes care of teeth.
items.example_en: The dentist checks my teeth every year.

items.definition_en: An artist draws, paints, or creates art.
items.example_en: The artist paints a big picture.

items.definition_en: A hairdresser cuts and styles people's hair.
items.example_en: The hairdresser cuts my hair every month.

items.definition_en: A student is a person who goes to school or studies.
items.example_en: The student writes notes in class.
